name: Lunch Pack Wild Rice
recipeIngredient: 1-2 uncooked sweet potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the cooked wild rice and cooked basmati rice together in a rice cooker with equal amounts of water.
2. Add the 1-2 uncooked sweet potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch pieces, to the rice mixture.
3. Stir in the fresh chopped parsley and salt to taste (use quite a bit for this dish).
4. Fill the cooked mixture into a plastic lunch box.
5. Nuke the filled lunch box on high for 10 minutes.
Note: This can also be made using pre-cooked sweet potatoes, reducing the nuke time to 3 minutes for reheating.
Variation: For extra flavoring, consider adding a couple of tablespoons of orange juice before cooking.
